query:
INSERT INTO feature_packages (name, slug, description, features, is_addon, addon_price) VALUES
('Core Platform', 'core', 'Essential scheduling and session management', '["scheduling", "sessions", "basic_reporting"]', FALSE, NULL),
('Team Management', 'team_management', 'User roles, permissions, and team coordination', '["user_roles", "permissions", "team_chat", "availability_calendar"]', FALSE, NULL),
('Finance Suite', 'finance', 'Invoice management, budget tracking, and approvals', '["invoices", "budget_lines", "finance_approvals", "payment_tracking"]', FALSE, NULL),
('Analytics Dashboard', 'analytics', 'Advanced reporting and performance insights', '["analytics_dashboard", "custom_reports", "data_export"]', FALSE, NULL),
('Video Meetings', 'video_meetings', 'Agora-powered video calls for remote sessions', '["video_calls", "attendance_tracking", "recording"]', FALSE, NULL),
('Team Rankings', 'team_rankings', 'Performance tracking and leaderboards', '["rankings", "performance_metrics", "achievements"]', FALSE, NULL),
('Social Media Manager', 'social_media', 'Content approval and social media scheduling', '["content_submission", "approval_workflow", "scheduling"]', TRUE, 50.00),
('Advanced Safeguarding', 'safeguarding', 'Enhanced compliance and document management', '["dbs_tracking", "compliance_alerts", "document_vault"]', TRUE, 75.00);
